Package index

Data Preparation

Functions for formatting and preparing test data

dataFormat()
dataFormat
longdataFormat()
Long Format Data Conversion

Descriptive Statistics

Item-level and test-level descriptive statistics

TestStatistics()
Simple Test Statistics
ItemStatistics()
Simple Item Statistics
ItemReport()
Generate Item Report for Non-Binary Test Data
ScoreReport()
Generate Score Report for Non-Binary Test Data
StudentAnalysis()
StudentAnalysis

CTT()
Classical Test Theory
AlphaCoefficient()
Alpha Coefficient
OmegaCoefficient()
Omega Coefficient
Dimensionality()

Item Analysis

ItemFit()
Model Fit Functions for Items
ItemTotalCorr()

ItemEntropy()
Item Entropy
ItemThreshold()
Item Threshold
ItemLift()
Item Lift
ItemOdds()
Item Odds
ITBiserial()
Item-Total Biserial Correlation
InterItemAnalysis()
Inter-Item Analysis for Psychometric Data

Test-level Analysis

Test-level fit and response functions

TestFit()
Model Fit Functions for test whole
TestFitSaturated()
Model Fit Functions for saturated model
TestResponseFunc()
TRF for IRT
TestInformationFunc()
TIF for IRT

Correlation Measures

Correlation and association measures

BiserialCorrelation()
Biserial Correlation

Tetrachoric Correlation Matrix
PolychoricCorrelationMatrix()
Polychoric Correlation Matrix
PhiCoefficient()
Phi-Coefficient
MutualInformation()
Mutual Information
tetrachoric()
Tetrachoric Correlation
polychoric()
Polychoric Correlation
polyserial()
Polyserial Correlation

Item Response Theory

IRT models for binary and polytomous data

IRT()
Estimating Item parameters using EM algorithm
GRM()
Graded Response Model (GRM)
RaschModel()
Rasch Model
TwoPLM()
Two-Parameter Logistic Model
ThreePLM()
Three-Parameter Logistic Model
LogisticModel()
Four-Parameter Logistic Model
IIF2PLM()
IIF for 2PLM
IIF3PLM()
IIF for 3PLM
ItemInformationFunc()
IIF for 4PLM
grm_prob()
Probability function for GRM
grm_iif()
Item Information Function for GRM

Latent Class / Rank Analysis

LCA and LRA for classification of examinees

LCA()
Latent Class Analysis
LRA()
Latent Rank Analysis

Biclustering

Simultaneous clustering of items and examinees

Biclustering()
Biclustering and Ranklustering Analysis
Biclustering_IRM()
Biclustering with Infinite Relational Model
GridSearch()
Grid Search for Optimal Parameters

Bayesian Network Models

Network models and structure learning

BNM()
Bayesian Network Model
BNM_GA()
Structure Learning for BNM by simple GA
BNM_PBIL()
Structure Learning for BNM by PBIL

Local Dependence Models

Models combining latent structure with item dependencies

LDLRA()
Local Dependence Latent Rank Analysis
LDLRA_PBIL()
Structure Learning for LDLRA by PBIL algorithm
LDB()
Local Dependence Biclustering
BINET()
Bicluster Network Model

Scoring Functions

Scoring and scaling functions

crr()
Correct Response Rate
nrs()
Number Right Score
passage()
Passage Rate of Student
percentile()
Student Percentile Ranks
sscore()
Standardized Score
stanine()
Stanine Scores
CSR()
Conditional Selection Rate
JSR()
Joint Selection Rate
CCRR()
Conditional Correct Response Rate
JCRR()
Joint Correct Response Rate
JointSampleSize()
Joint Sample Size

Model Fit

Model fit index computation

calcFitIndices()

Deprecated

Functions deprecated since v1.5.0 (to be removed in v2.0.0)

StrLearningPBIL_BNM()

StrLearningPBIL_LDLRA()

S3 Methods

Plot and print methods for exametrika objects

plot(<exametrika>)
Plot Method for Objects of Class "exametrika"
print(<exametrika>)
Print Method for Exametrika Objects

Internal

Internal helper functions (not intended for direct use)

AlphaIfDel()
Alpha Coefficient if Item removed
BitRespPtn()
Binary pattern maker
LD_param_est()
LDparam set
PSD_item_params()
internal functions for PSD of Item parameters
asymprior()
Prior distribution function with guessing parameter
maxParents_penalty()
Utility function for searching DAG
objective_function_IRT()
Log-likelihood function used in the Maximization Step (M-Step).
slopeprior()
Prior distribution function with respect to the slope.
softmax()
softmax function
